Name: Emberclaw Beast
Description: A Wild creature with a burning ferocity, the Emberclaw Beast is known for its flaming talons and fiery temperament.

Abilities.Name: Ember Swipe
Abilities.Description: A burning claw attack that may leave the enemy with a burn.

Abilities.Name: Wild Howl
Abilities.Description: The beast howls fiercely, increasing its Attack.

Taming Info.Special Requirement: Taming success rate increases if the beast is afflicted with a status ailment.

Name: Glyphroot Guardian
Description: An ancient construct born from the arcane scripts engraved on its bark-like armor. Its movements are slow but unyielding.

Abilities.Name: Root Guard
Abilities.Description: The guardian strengthens its defenses using its roots.

Abilities.Name: Glyph Barrage
Abilities.Description: The guardian releases a barrage of magical glyphs at the enemy.

Taming Info.Special Requirement: Can only be tamed at night.

Name: Mistshadow Phantom
Description: A spectral entity shrouded in a chilling mist, the Mistshadow Phantom is as elusive as it is haunting.

Abilities.Name: Shadow Slash
Abilities.Description: The phantom rends its enemy with a shadowy claw.

Abilities.Name: Mist Cloak
Abilities.Description: The phantom cloaks itself in mist, increasing its evasiveness.

Taming Info.Special Requirement: Can only be tamed in the fog.

Name: Thornbeast Strider
Description: The Thornbeast Strider is a feral creature, its body armed with sharp thorns. It moves quickly, leaving painful marks on its foes.

Abilities.Name: Thorn Volley
Abilities.Description: The beast shoots thorns from its body in a rapid volley.

Abilities.Name: Feral Dash
Abilities.Description: The beast charges at the enemy with reckless speed.

Name: Crystalglyph Golem
Description: An ancient construct of crystal, inscribed with arcane glyphs. It moves with a slow, deliberate grace, shimmering in the light.

Abilities.Name: Crystal Smash
Abilities.Description: The golem attacks the enemy with a crystal arm.

Abilities.Name: Glyph Drain
Abilities.Description: The golem drains the enemy's HP with glyph magic.

Taming Info.Special Requirement: Taming success rate increases if the player has a high magic level.

Here is the generated `Cargo.toml` file:

```toml
[package]
name = "beastlight"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2018"

# The workspace configuration allows for managing multiple related packages in a single file
[workspace]
members = ["beastlight"]

# The build target configuration for WebAssembly
[build]
target = "wasm32-unknown-unknown"

# The dependencies for the project with exact versions and specified features
[dependencies]
bevy = { version = "0.12", features = ["dynamic", "wayland", "webgl2"] }
bevy_ecs_tilemap = { version = "0.12", features = ["atlas"] }
bevy_yoleck = { version = "0.17", features = ["vpeol_2d"] }
mapgen = { version = "0.5" }
bevy_egui = { version = "0.23" }
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_yaml = { version = "0.9" }
rand = { version = "0.8" }

# The release profile configurations for optimization
[profile.release]
# Optimize for size on web builds
codegen-units = 1
debug = false
incremental = false
lto = true
opt-level = 'z'
overflow-checks = true
panic = 'abort'

[profile.dev]
# Optimize for performance on native builds
debug = true
incremental = true
lto = false
opt-level = 3
overflow-checks = false
panic = 'unwind'

# The feature flags for web builds
[features]
default = ["web"]
web = ["bevy/webgl2"]
```

This `Cargo.toml` file specifies the package information, workspace configuration, build target, dependencies, release profiles, and feature flags. The `profile.release` section is configured for size optimization which is suitable for web builds, while the `profile.dev` section is configured for performance optimization which is suitable for native builds. The `features` section specifies the default features to be used in web builds.
